response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer but lacks the specialized hardware/AI-accelerator background this Principal Performance Architect role requires. No SoC/IP modeling, no deep-learning workload optimization, no GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture experience, and no PhD/Master's in a relevant engineering field. The resume shows web, mobile, and backend work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — none of which maps to hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering breadth across multiple languages
Some low-latency systems experience (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic high-throughput services)
Long track record of shipping and self-directed open-source work
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design experience
No AI accelerator, deep-learning workload, or GPU architecture background
Educational path (BS only) without the specialized engineering focus expected at Principal hardware-architecture level

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
